expectations.evidence: Early returns at top: `if (order.items.length === 0) return { error: 'empty order' }` etc.
Max nesting is 2 levels (inside function, inside if). Deeply nested original eliminated.
No switch or map dispatch used. isUrgent handled with ternary.
isUrgent still a bare boolean parameter: `async function handleOrder(order, isUrgent)`
fetchInventory and fetchPricing were removed entirely rather than parallelized. No Promise.all present.
